title: Bilderdykia multiflora
taxonomy: Bilderdykia multiflora is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Campanulaceae, a family of bellflowers. Bilderdykia multiflora is native to South Africa. This plant is further classified as belonging to the tribe Lobelieae, a group of flowering plants within the Campanulaceae family. The species Bilderdykia multiflora is unique in its classification due to its distinct characteristics. Bilderdykia multiflora is a relatively rare and lesser-known member of the Campanulaceae family.

Bilderdykia multiflora is said to possess antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and reducing swelling.
